extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won bunch sprint after Mitchelton-Scott controlled finale, holding off former teammate BETTIOL who couldn't come around in final 150m.
tactical_patterns: Sunweb completely controlled breakaway tempo with consistent chase, allowing no other teams to dictate race despite Mitchelton having sprinter.
RICE Michael rode breakaway without single turn, exploited other riders' work to finish 5th, showing freeloading can succeed tactically.
POWER Rob sacrificed GC position finishing 8:27 down, explicitly working for HINDLEY's overall rather than contesting stage or protecting placement.
Mitchelton-Scott only assumed pace-setting duties after final climb with 16km remaining, conserving energy by letting Sunweb do early work.

rider_signals.POWER Rob: negative: willingness to destroy own GC by finishing 8:27 down while working for Hindley suggests he's not in condition to defend top-10
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: negative: on winner's wheel in final 150m but couldn't come around former teammate Groves, suggesting either positioning error or insufficient power
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: neutral: briefly distanced over final climb suggests weight disadvantage on steep gradients despite being pure sprinter
rider_signals.HILL Ben: negative: monumental cramp forced complete stop after making early aggression, indicates he overcooked early hour smashfest on Tawonga Gap
